info.title: Evolution GO Layer
info.description: Pilot Status API Layer — Evolution GO. Base URL `https://pilotstatus.com.br/api/layer/evolution-go`. Authenticate with the `apikey` header (your Pilot Status `ps_` key) or `Authorization: Bearer`. Instance/session endpoints are NOT available through the layer.

apiKey.name: apikey
apiKey.description: Your Pilot Status API key (ps_...). Evolution GO also accepts `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

post.description: Places an outbound WhatsApp voice call to the given number and returns the created call session.

number.description: Recipient phone in DDI+DDD+number format (e.g. `5511999999999`) or a full JID.

get.description: Returns all currently tracked call sessions for the number.

post.description: Returns the current state of a single tracked call session.

callId.description: Identifier of the call to fetch. An empty body is accepted (returns the latest tracked call).

post.description: Answers a ringing incoming call; omit `callId` to answer the latest incoming call.

callId.description: Identifier of the incoming call to answer. When omitted, the most recent incoming call is answered.

post.description: Rejects a call; if the call is no longer tracked, it falls back to rejecting via `callCreator`.

callId.description: Identifier of the call to reject.

callCreator.description: JID of the caller, used as a fallback when the call is not tracked (e.g. `5511999999999@s.whatsapp.net`).

post.description: Rejects a currently tracked call by its identifier.

callId.description: Identifier of the tracked call to reject.

post.description: Rejects the most recently offered incoming call for the number.
Ends an active call by its identifier.

callId.description: Identifier of the active call to hang up.

post.description: Streams an audio file into an active call. Accepts this JSON body (server-side `filePath`) or a `multipart/form-data` upload with fields `callId`, `audio` (or `file`) and `hangupAfterPlay`.

callId.description: Identifier of the active call to play into.

filePath.description: Server-side path to the audio file (`.mp3`, `.wav` or `.opus`).

hangupAfterPlay.description: When `true`, ends the call automatically once playback finishes. Defaults to `false`.

post.description: Creates a short-lived token and WebSocket URL for streaming realtime PCM audio to/from an active call.

callId.description: Identifier of the active call to attach media to.

mode.description: `talk` (send and receive audio, default) or `listen` (receive only).

post.description: Pins a chat to the top of the list.

chat.description: JID of the chat to pin (individual `...@s.whatsapp.net` or group `...@g.us`).

post.description: Removes a chat from the pinned list.

chat.description: JID of the chat to unpin.

post.description: Archives a chat, hiding it from the main list.

chat.description: JID of the chat to archive.

post.description: Restores an archived chat back to the main list.

chat.description: JID of the chat to unarchive.

post.description: Mutes notifications for a chat.

chat.description: JID of the chat to mute.

post.description: Re-enables notifications for a muted chat.

chat.description: JID of the chat to unmute.

post.description: Requests older message history from before a reference message. The `messageInfo` object identifies the anchor message (its `Chat` JID, message `ID`, direction flags, and `Timestamp`); fields are unmarshalled from the whatsmeow `MessageInfo` type, so keys are PascalCase and `Chat` is a JID **string**.

messageInfo.description: Reference message to sync history before. Contains `Chat` (JID string), `ID` (message id), `IsFromMe` (boolean), `IsGroup` (boolean), and `Timestamp` (RFC 3339).

count.description: Number of messages to fetch before the reference message.

post.description: Creates a new community with the given name.

communityName.description: Display name of the community to create.

post.description: Links one or more existing groups to a community.

groupJid.description: Array of group JIDs to add to the community.

post.description: Unlinks one or more groups from a community.

groupJid.description: Array of group JIDs to remove from the community.

get.description: Returns every group the connected number has joined.

post.description: Fetches metadata (name, participants, owner) for a single group.
Returns the group's invite link, optionally revoking the old one first.

reset.description: When `true`, revokes the current link and generates a new one.

post.description: Sets the group's profile picture from a public URL or a base64 data URI.

image.description: Image as an `http(s)` URL or a `data:image/jpeg;base64,` / `data:image/png;base64,` data URI.

post.description: Updates the group's subject (name).
Updates the group's description (topic).
Creates a new group with the given name and initial participants.

participants.description: Phone numbers or JIDs to add (at least one).

post.description: Adds, removes, promotes, or demotes participants in a group.

participants.description: Phone numbers or JIDs to act on (at least one).

get.description: Returns only the groups the connected number owns (is admin/owner of).

post.description: Joins a group using an invite code (the token from an invite link).
Leaves the specified group.
Attaches an existing label to a chat.

labelId.description: ID of the label to attach.

post.description: Attaches an existing label to a specific message in a chat.

jid.description: Chat JID that contains the message.

labelId.description: ID of the label to attach.

post.description: Creates or updates a label's name, color, or deleted state.

labelId.description: ID of the label to edit.

deleted.description: Marks the label as deleted when true.

get.description: Returns every label defined on the connected number.

post.description: Detaches a label from a chat.

jid.description: Chat JID to remove the label from.

labelId.description: ID of the label to detach.

post.description: Detaches a label from a specific message in a chat.

jid.description: Chat JID that contains the message.

labelId.description: ID of the label to detach.

post.description: Sends an emoji reaction to an existing message; supports `fromMe` and (for group messages) the `participant` author.

number.description: Recipient chat, as a phone in E.164 digits or a JID

reaction.description: Emoji to react with (send an empty string to remove the reaction)

id.description: ID of the message to react to

fromMe.description: Whether the target message was sent by you

participant.description: Author JID of the message (needed for group messages)

post.description: Broadcasts a typing or recording presence indicator to a chat.

number.description: Target chat, as a phone in E.164 digits or a JID

isAudio.description: When true, shows "recording audio" instead of typing

post.description: Marks one or more messages in a chat as read.

number.description: Chat whose messages are being read, as a phone in E.164 digits or a JID

id.description: Array of message IDs to mark as read

post.description: Downloads and decrypts the media attached to a received message, returning it as a base64 data URL.

message.description: Full message payload containing the media node to download — one of `imageMessage`, `audioMessage`, `videoMessage`, `documentMessage`, or `stickerMessage` — with its `url`, `directPath`, `mediaKey`, `fileEncSHA256`, `fileSHA256`, `mimetype`, and `fileLength`

post.description: Looks up the stored delivery status of a message by its ID.

id.description: ID of the message to look up

post.description: Revokes a message for everyone in the chat.

chat.description: Chat where the message lives, as a JID or phone in E.164 digits

messageId.description: ID of the message to revoke

post.description: Replaces the text content of a previously sent message.

chat.description: Chat where the message lives, as a JID or phone in E.164 digits

message.description: New text content for the message

messageId.description: ID of the message to edit

post.description: Creates a new newsletter (channel) with a name and optional description.

example.name: Pilot Status Updates
example.description: Official channel for product news and status.

get.description: Returns all newsletters the connected number is subscribed to.

post.description: Fetches metadata for a single newsletter by its JID.
Resolves newsletter metadata from an invite key (the code portion of a channel invite link).

key.description: Invite key from the channel link (e.g. the part after `whatsapp.com/channel/`).

post.description: Subscribes the connected number to live updates for the given newsletter JID.
Fetches messages from a newsletter, with optional count and before-id pagination.

count.description: Maximum number of messages to return.

before_id.description: Return messages older than this message id (pagination cursor).

post.description: Sends a plain text message; when `linkPreview` is true the server enriches the first URL in `text` with an OpenGraph preview card.

number.description: Recipient MSISDN or JID (e.g. `5511999999999` or `5511999999999@s.whatsapp.net`, group `...@g.us`).

linkPreview.description: Fetch OpenGraph metadata for the first URL in `text` and attach a preview.

formatJid.description: Auto-format `number` into a JID (default `true`); set `false` to send the value as-is.

post.description: Sends a text message with a rich link card; the server auto-fetches `title`, `description` and `imgUrl` from the URL found in `text`, so those fields are optional and any value you pass may be overridden.

text.description: Message body containing the URL to preview.

title.description: Preview title (auto-filled from OpenGraph when omitted).

post.description: Sends an image, video, audio or document by URL (JSON body) — or as a `multipart/form-data` upload with a `file` field; `type` selects the media kind.

url.description: Media URL (JSON mode). In `multipart/form-data`, send the binary in a `file` field instead.

post.description: Sends a poll with a question and a list of options; requires at least two options.

maxAnswer.description: Maximum options a voter may select (`1` = single choice).

post.description: Sends a sticker from an image URL; the server downloads it and converts it to WebP before sending.

sticker.description: `http(s)` image URL to convert into a sticker.

post.description: Sends a geographic location pin with a name and address label.
Sends a vCard contact card; `fullName` and `phone` are required inside `vcard`.
Sends an interactive message with tappable buttons; each button's behavior is set per-item via `type` (reply, url, call, copy, etc.).

buttons.description: Button objects: `{ type, displayText, id, url, phoneNumber, copyCode, currency, name, keyType, key }`.

post.description: Sends a menu message where the recipient taps `buttonText` to open sections of selectable rows.

buttonText.description: Label of the button that opens the list.

sections.description: Section objects: `{ title, rows: [{ title, description, rowId }] }`.

post.description: Sends a horizontally scrollable carousel; each card has its own image, text and buttons.

cards.description: Card objects: `{ text, thumbnailUrl, footerText, buttons: [Button] }`.

post.description: Fetches WhatsApp account details (JID, name, business name) for one or more phone numbers.

number.description: Phone numbers in international format to look up.

formatJid.description: When true, returns each result keyed by formatted JID.

post.description: Checks whether the given phone numbers are registered on WhatsApp.

number.description: Phone numbers in international format to verify.

formatJid.description: When true, returns each result keyed by formatted JID.

post.description: Returns the profile picture URL for a phone number.

preview.description: When true, returns the low-resolution preview image instead of the full-size picture.

get.description: Returns all contacts stored for the connected number.
Returns the connected number's current privacy settings.

post.description: Updates the connected number's privacy settings. Each field takes a privacy scope such as `all`, `contacts`, `contact_blacklist`, `known`, `match_last_seen`, or `none`.

groupAdd.description: Who can add you to groups (`all`, `contacts`, `contact_blacklist`, `none`).

lastSeen.description: Who can see your last seen (`all`, `contacts`, `contact_blacklist`, `none`).

profile.description: Who can see your profile photo (`all`, `contacts`, `contact_blacklist`, `none`).

online.description: Who can see when you are online (`all`, `match_last_seen`).

post.description: Blocks the given contact for the connected number.

number.description: Phone number in international format to block.

post.description: Removes the given contact from the block list.

number.description: Phone number in international format to unblock.

get.description: Returns the block list for the connected number.

post.description: Sets the connected number's profile picture.

image.description: Image as a URL or base64-encoded data.

post.description: Updates the connected number's display name.
Updates the connected number's status (about) text.
